case_title: JULIYA GANINA VS. DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO STEVE BARBARICH BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-28-2013 AT 3:30 PM.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GANINA, JULIYA AS TO DEFENDANT DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES LLC BARBARICH, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR GANINA, JULIYA ASSIGNED TO LEE, JAMES LEONARD JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED SEP-11-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA. NOT REPORTED. DEPT 506.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GANINA, JULIYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES LLC $3,920.73 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,025.73, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST STEVE BARBARICH IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE--NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
